creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
Created attachment 192746
truss output

Hi,

I am trying to create 5 node replica set (4 data nodes + 1 arbiter).

FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE.

Nodes have connectivity, I am able to form the cluster but it fails when I want to add user.

Truss output attached.

root@mongo0:~ # mongo
MongoDB shell version v3.6.3
connecting to: mongodb://127.0.0.1:27017
